name: Cranberry Fruit Nut Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Generously grease and lightly flour a 9x5x3 loaf pan. Mix cranberries, nuts, and orange peel together in a bowl. In another bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in orange juice, egg, and grated orange peel, mixing just to moisten. Fold in the cranberries and nuts. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly. Bake for 60 minutes (toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean). Cool on a rack for 15 minutes before removing from the pan. Allow it to cool completely before serving.
